resources.string: This permission is used only to warn before the next access change. The main status screen works without notifications.
A parent enabled this feature on the home router. Sheepfold sends only a limited active-SIM snapshot while connected at home; ICCID, IMSI, and IMEI are not collected.
New Wi-Fi network notifications for a parent
A parent enabled the new-network journal. The permission is used for the network name and a local access-point fingerprint; the raw BSSID is not sent to the router.
New Wi-Fi network and the phone’s last location
A parent separately enabled adding the phone’s last available location to a new-network event. It is not a verified access-point address or background cloud tracking.
Sheepfold cannot reach the home router right now. This does not mean that internet access is disabled; connect to the home Wi-Fi or try again later.
